environment.uname: Linux c61d96076369 6.8.0-45-generic #45~22.04.1-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Sep 11 15:25:05 UTC 2 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

purpose: Embree vs OptiX/RT baseline across promoted benchmark apps before Triton/Numba partner work.

optix_performance.note: OptiX triangle-count currently uses a host-indexed CSR probe correctness path; native graph-ray mode is available behind RTDL_OPTIX_GRAPH_MODE=native but is not an RTX graph acceleration claim until cloud-gated.

section.ray_tracing_note: Embree uses ray traversal over graph-edge primitives to collect candidate neighbor sets; CPU-side set intersection and uniqueness bookkeeping remain outside the RT traversal.
